name: awesomeness
description: Collective Idea's Awesomeness.  A collection of useful Rails bits and pieces.

name: audited
description: Audited (formerly acts_as_audited) is an ORM extension that logs all changes to your Rails models.

name: acts_as_geocodable
description: Simple geocoding for Active Record models

name: acts_as_money
description: an Active Record plugin that makes it easier to work with the money gem

name: clear_empty_attributes
description: When Active Record objects are saved from a form, empty fields are saved as empty strings instead of nil.  This kills most validations.

name: css_naked_day
description: A Rails plugin that disables all CSS on CSS Naked Day

name: imap_authenticatable
description: Authenticate your Rails app using any IMAP server!

name: random_finders
description: A Rails plugin that allows quick and easy fetching of random records, or records in random order.

name: with_action
description: A respond_to style helper for doing different actions based on which request parameters are passed.

name: graticule
description: Graticule is a geocoding API for looking up address coordinates and performing distance calculations, supporting many popular APIs.

name: tinder
description: Tinder is a Ruby API for interfacing with Campfire, the 37Signals chat application.

name: awesome_nested_set
description: An awesome replacement for acts_as_nested_set and better_nested_set.

name: action_mailer_optional_tls
description: Enables TLS on SMTP connections (for services like GMail)

name: google_analytics
description: Automatically insert Google Analytics code into your pages

name: perfecttime
description: Mike West's PerfectTime.js, with a few updates.

name: recursable
description: Some helpers for using trees in Rails

name: attribute_fu
description: rails multi-model forms made easy!

name: caldav
description: A Ruby CalDAV client

name: merger
description: A gem for merging Active Record models

name: delayed_job
description: Database based asynchronous priority queue system -- Extracted from Shopify

name: yardvote.com
description: Tracking political yard signs.

name: money
description: Leetsoft's Money library

name: mephisto_atompub
description: AtomPub plugin for mephisto

name: searchparty
description: Simple site that aggregates Google, Delicious, and GitHub searches.  See http://search.collectiveidea.com

name: mephisto-comment-notification
description: A simple comment notification plugin for the Mephisto blogging engine.

name: awesome-backup
description: Rails plugin that provides Rake and Capistrano tasks for making database backups

name: eharbor
description: Example Rails application for Ruby on Rails training used by Collective Idea and Idea Foundry (http://ideafoundry.info/ruby-on-rails). Note: we often use interactive rebases, so commit dates may not make sense.
